applicabilityConditions: Current resource deployment is not aligned with the highest-priority work or productive use.
recommendedAction: Reduce or reallocate resources toward the highest-priority work while preserving focused investment.
nonApplicabilityConditions: A verified high-growth opportunity has customer-valued differentiation and prior execution supports additional investment.
guardrails: Judge cost discipline by resource placement and return evidence rather than imposing uniform cuts.
Preserve execution continuity while changing headcount or cost structure.
exceptions: Expand operating expense and headcount selectively when growth, differentiation, and execution evidence jointly support the investment.
reversalSignals: Priority alignment improves, reductions impair a verified growth opportunity, or customer-valued differentiation and execution evidence justify renewed expansion.

review.rationale: Policy synchronized to the approved cost-efficiency contrast with explicit selective reinvestment action and observable reversal signals.
